allow: PowerShell($dll = \(Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Filter 'OpenTK.Windowing.Desktop.dll' 'C:\\Users\\simon\\.nuget\\packages\\opentk.windowing.desktop' | Sort-Object -Descending { $_.FullName } | Select-Object -First 1\).FullName; Write-Host "DLL: $dll"; $asm = [System.Reflection.Assembly]::LoadFrom\($dll\); $t = $asm.GetType\('OpenTK.Windowing.Desktop.NativeWindow'\); if \($t\) { $t.GetProperties\(\) | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'ize|Min|Max|Client' } | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.Name\) : $\($_.PropertyType.Name\)" } } else { "Type not found" })

PowerShell($dll = 'C:\\Users\\simon\\.nuget\\packages\\opentk.windowing.desktop\\4.9.4\\lib\\net8.0\\OpenTK.Windowing.Desktop.dll'; if \(Test-Path $dll\) { $asm = [System.Reflection.Assembly]::LoadFrom\($dll\); $t = $asm.GetType\('OpenTK.Windowing.Desktop.NativeWindow'\); if \($t\) { $t.GetProperties\(\) | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'ize|Min|Max|Client' } | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.Name\) : $\($_.PropertyType.Name\)" } } else { "Type not found" } } else { "DLL not found" })

PowerShell($dll = 'C:\\Users\\simon\\.nuget\\packages\\opentk.windowing.desktop\\4.9.4\\lib\\netcoreapp3.1\\OpenTK.Windowing.Desktop.dll'; $asm = [System.Reflection.Assembly]::LoadFrom\($dll\); $t = $asm.GetType\('OpenTK.Windowing.Desktop.NativeWindow'\); if \($t\) { $t.GetProperties\(\) | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'ize|Min|Max|Client|Loc|Bord|State|Title|Cursor|VSync|Icon' } | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.Name\) : $\($_.PropertyType.FullName\)" } } else { "Type not found" })
